name: Galleria
description: Galleria is an advanced content gallery component.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier of the element.

props.name: value
props.description: An array of objects to display.

props.name: activeIndex
props.description: Index of the first item.

props.name: fullScreen
props.description: Whether to display the component on fullscreen.

props.name: visible
props.description: Specifies the visibility of the mask on fullscreen mode.

props.name: numVisible
props.description: Number of items per page.

props.name: responsiveOptions
props.description: An array of options for responsive design.

props.name: showItemNavigators
props.description: Whether to display navigation buttons in item section.

props.name: showThumbnailNavigators
props.description: Whether to display navigation buttons in thumbnail container.

props.name: showItemNavigatorsOnHover
props.description: Whether to display navigation buttons on item hover.

props.name: changeItemOnIndicatorHover
props.description: When enabled, item is changed on indicator hover.

props.name: circular
props.description: Defines if scrolling would be infinite.

props.name: autoPlay
props.description: Items are displayed with a slideshow in autoPlay mode.

props.name: transitionInterval
props.description: Time in milliseconds to scroll items.

props.name: showThumbnails
props.description: Whether to display thumbnail container.

props.name: thumbnailsPosition
props.description: Position of thumbnails.

props.name: verticalThumbnailViewPortHeight
props.description: Height of the viewport in vertical thumbnail.

props.name: showIndicators
props.description: Whether to display indicator container.

props.name: showIndicatorsOnItem
props.description: When enabled, indicator container is displayed on item container.

props.name: indicatorsPosition
props.description: Position of indicators.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: maskClass
props.description: Style class of the mask on fullscreen mode.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Inline style of the component on fullscreen mode. Otherwise, the 'style' property can be used.

props.name: containerClass
props.description: Style class of the component on fullscreen mode. Otherwise, the 'class' property can be used.

props.name: containerProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLDivElement to the container element on fullscreen mode.

props.name: prevButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the previous navigation button.

props.name: nextButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the next navigation button.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive element.

props.name: ariaRoledescription
props.description: Defines a string value that description for the role of the component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: update:activeIndex
events.description: Emitted when the active index changes.

slots.name: indicator
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Index of the indicator item */ index: number; /** * Current active item index as a number. */ activeIndex: number; /** * Index of the element in tabbing order. */ tabindex: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: previousitemicon
slots.description: Custom navigator previous item icon template.

slots.name: nextitemicon
slots.description: Custom navigator next item icon template.
